title: schradera schlechteri
intro: Schradera schlechteri, also known as the Schlechter's schradera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Schradera schlechteri include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by drying the leaves and stems, then making a tea infusion or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
